phrases.intent_en: How to reach Hohe Straße from here?
phrases.text_local: Wie komme ich zur Hohe Straße?
phrases.cultural_note: Hohe Straße is an eastern end of Schildergasse, but exact navigation may require staff assistance due to dense crowds.

likely_response.local: Einfach geradeaus, bis zur großen Kreuzung.
likely_response.translation_en: Just straight ahead, until the big intersection.

responses.english: Just straight ahead, until the big intersection.
responses.french: Einfach geradeaus, bis zur großen Kreuzung.

phrases.intent_en: Is this the only fitting room floor?
phrases.cultural_note: Fitting rooms in German retail stores are often concentrated on one floor, typically near the entrance or central area.

phrases.intent_en: Can I split café bill for separate payments?
phrases.text_local: Kann ich die Rechnung getrennt bezahlen?
phrases.cultural_note: In German cafés/restaurants, splitting bills is common but must be requested explicitly.

phrases.intent_en: Where are Peek & Cloppenburg checkout counters?
phrases.text_local: Wo sind die Kassen von Peek & Cloppenburg?
phrases.cultural_note: Kassen are typically located near the main entrance or central area of large department stores in Germany.
